chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4594 of 2020 Sheikh Waqar Ahmed Versus Government of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections 2. For orders on Misc. No.20052/20 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 21.04.2025 None present. -.-.- This is an old case of 2020, which is over five years ago. It was lastly taken up on 02.04.2024. Since then no urgent application has been moved by learned counsel for the petitioners for hearing of the case. Today learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without any intimation, which shows that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is hereby dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
